whatsWorking: Orchestration at scale: ~4,779 delegation events, roughly one subagent per 3 messages
Session-capture hooks run silently on every meaningful session
Healthy 7/7 active days with no late-night degradation, evening 21:00 peak is focus time
friction: Mega-threads (fho 8,615 records / 45.8h, talux-context 8,405 / 24h) pushed cost from 55K to 139K tokens per message, no compaction
A 6-hour, 565-turn fho thread ran at 92 turns/hour with zero subagent dispatches
A 5.3-hour, 158-turn talux-context session ran with zero delegation
tips: Compact proactively before a thread crosses ~2,000 messages
Time-box at ~300 turns, then handoff to a file and start fresh
After 21:00 Melbourne, default to dispatch-only: batch tasks to the queue rather than hand-driving
Route long investigations to gsd:execute-phase (worktree + tmux) instead of running inline
Structure high-stakes one-offs (CV, investor docs) as researcher -> writer -> reviewer fan-outs
notes: Status line already shows live nudges for tips 1-3 (message-count health hints at 150/300/2000, plus a 21:00 dispatch-only guard).
